objective: Versionar plan remoto y matrices locales
allowed_actions: crear evidencia local; validar; commit local
blocked_actions: push; PR; tag push; merge; workflow_dispatch; live
stop_condition: validator fail; dirty no explicado; archivo fuera de alcance

objective: Verificar remoto, permisos, PRs, labels, workflows y tags
allowed_actions: lectura GitHub; gh repo/pr/issue/label/workflow; git ls-remote
blocked_actions: push; PR; tag push; merge; workflow_dispatch; live
stop_condition: repo ambiguo; auth ausente; tag remoto existente; labels/checks/workflows bloqueantes

objective: Publicar rama candidate sin tag ni PR
blocked_actions: tag push; PR; merge; workflow_dispatch; live
stop_condition: workspace dirty; remoto divergente; push rechazado
PR existente conflictivo; base/head ambiguos; body incompleto
rollback: cerrar PR draft si owner lo ordena

objective: Leer checks y feedback sin merge
allowed_actions: gh pr view/checks/comments; fixes documentales si aplica
stop_condition: checks fail; REQUEST_CHANGES; secreto; permisos; live; workflow unsafe
rollback: commit revert o cerrar PR segun finding

stop_condition: tag remoto ya existe; PR/checks no estabilizados
rollback: git push origin :refs/tags/v0.6.0-rc1 solo con owner

allowed_actions: crear readback final; commit; push a branch candidate
